readiness_rationale: Claims ready: the argon2 hashing path and the rate-limit step are both believed solid, so AC-1 and AC-4 can ship together. (This fixture deliberately rests a ready step on led-0008, which is only assumed in the ledger - the readiness gate must reject it.)

grounded: led-0007 (verified, npm test auth.spec.ts green): short-lived JWT + refresh chosen and a happy-path token round-trips.
tentative: led-0008 (assumed, contract AC-4): refresh endpoint must be rate-limited - no oracle yet.

candidate_steps.action: Wire the existing argon2 hasher into the user registration path so AC-1 passes.
stop_or_remeasure_if: AC-1 oracle stays red after wiring

candidate_steps.action: Add rate-limiting middleware to the refresh endpoint so AC-4 passes.

recommended_next_action.action: Wire the existing argon2 hasher into the registration path.
recommended_next_action.why: Cheapest verified-backed change that flips AC-1 green.
